name: soft-blob-touch
title: Soft Blob Touch
description: A granular soft blob idles with slow internal drift; a scripted touch dot decel-arrives, the blob deforms toward it with an attraction bulge, then recovers with a velocity-preserving spring. No hard edges anywhere.
evidence: Wave L L4: the AI-orb material beat from the frame study (alexwidua 1702356241186476225 sheet-02, a granular blob leaning toward a finger and springing back)

variables.label: Touch X
variables.description: Touch point, percent of host width.

variables.label: Touch Y
variables.description: Touch point, percent of host height.

variables.label: Touch at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start when the dot makes contact.

variables.label: Grain
variables.description: Speck register for the granular body.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Body tint: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the frame leaves. None holds the settled blob.
